tasks.label: serve
tasks.detail: Uruchamia lokalny serwer HTTP na porcie 4173 (jesli juz dziala, nie startuje drugiego)
args: $up = try { (Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:4173 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 1).StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $false }; if (-not $up) { Start-Process python -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','4173' -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}' -WindowStyle Hidden; do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $up = try { (Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:4173 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 1).StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $false } } until ($up) }; Write-Host 'Serwer dziala na http://localhost:4173'
